_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Fracture - Single Bone - Forearm - ORIF - Plating, Nailing
source_files: Fracture - Single & Both Bones - Forearm - ORIF - Plating Nailing_Medco.pdf
Fracture - Single & Both Bones - Forearm - ORIF - Plating Nailing_PPD.CPD.pdf
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 5 years' experience
clinical_indications: Fractures of both radius and ulna are one of the most common fractures in adults due to industrial, road traffic accidents, sports.

Forearm fractures are viewed as articular fractures as slight deviation in the spatial orientation of the radius and ulna decreases the forearm's rotational amplitude and thereby impairs the positioning and function of the hand.
Intramedullary nailing of forearm fractures, open reduction and internal fixation of fracture remains the treatment of choice for most forearm fractures.
The goal is to obtain sound union with excellent functional outcome and early mobilization.

preauth.label: Clinical notes with history, signs, symptoms, evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management and advice for admission
X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) confirming the diagnosis

claim.label: Post-procedure X-ray labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) - Showing implant
Invoice or barcode of Implant used (optional)

ppd_preauth.q: Are the clinical notes and imaging reports indicative of procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Are the clinical notes and imaging reports indicative of procedure?

common_queries: Clinical notes and/or imaging reports are not indicative of the procedure.
Pre-authorization X-ray missing, unlabelled, or not confirming diagnosis.
Post-procedure X-ray missing, unlabelled, or not showing implant for claim submission.
Invoice or barcode of Implant used is missing for claim submission (optional document may cause queries if not provided).
Pre-authorization clinical photograph of affected part missing.

clinical_key_pointers: It is essential to regain length, apposition
Axial alignment and normal rotational alignment
Treating diaphyseal fractures of the radius and the ulna to gain good range of motion.
surgical_options: Plating: Dorsal Thompson approach, Volar henrys approach.
additional_information.post_op_care: Immobilized, Suture removal, follow-up and removal of plate/nail.
